scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "cross-env BROWSER=chrome BROWSER_ARGS=--incognito npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run migrate --prefix backend && npm run seed --prefix backend
